name: Zucchini Parmigiana
recipeIngredient: garlic (as much as you like) - minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onion and garlic in oil until translucent.
2. Add tomatoes and bring to boiling point.
3. Simmer for 30 minutes.
4. Add tomato paste diluted with water (approximately 3 cans) and simmer for at least 1 hour.
5. Stir in parsley, basil, and oregano to taste, then simmer for a few more minutes.
6. Coat zucchini slices with flour and saute lightly in oil.
7. Layer zucchini slices in a baking dish, cover with sauce, and top with parmesan cheese.
8. Repeat layers until all zucchini is used.
9. Cover the dish and bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
10. Uncover and bake an additional 15 minutes.
